title: Daredevil in the Castle
writer: Hiroshi Inagaki, Takeshi Kimura, Genzo Murakami
actors: Toshirô Mifune, Kyôko Kagawa, Yuriko Hoshi
plot: Mohei is a wandering swordsman. He arrives in the city of Osaka, where the Toyotomi clan accepts him and comes to depend upon his courage and his battlefield skills. Those skills are sorely tested when Osaka Castle is besieged by ...
